name: scream-tail
flavor_text: There has been only one reported sighting of this Pokémon. It resembles a mysterious creature depicted in an old expedition journal.

moves.name: pound
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: sing
moves.effect: Puts the target to sleep.

moves.name: disable
moves.effect: Disables the target’s last used move for 1-8 turns.

moves.name: howl
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: noble-roar
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: bite
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: wish
moves.effect: User will recover half its max HP at the end of the next turn.

moves.name: perish-song
moves.effect: User and target both faint after three turns.

moves.name: boomburst
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: amnesia
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by two stages.

moves.name: baton-pass
moves.effect: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.

moves.name: blizzard
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: body-slam
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: bulk-up
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage.

moves.name: calm-mind
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: crunch
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: dazzling-gleam
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: dig
moves.effect: User digs underground, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.

moves.name: double-edge
moves.effect: User receives 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.

moves.name: drain-punch
moves.effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

moves.name: encore
moves.effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move every turn for 2 to 6 turns.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: expanding-force
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: fake-tears
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.

moves.name: fire-blast
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: fire-fang
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target and a 10% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: fire-punch
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: flamethrower
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: fling
moves.effect: Throws held item at the target; power depends on the item.

moves.name: focus-blast
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: grass-knot
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.

moves.name: gyro-ball
moves.effect: Power raises when the user has lower Speed, up to a maximum of 150.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: hyper-voice
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: ice-beam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: ice-fang
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target and a 10% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: ice-punch
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: imprison
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using any moves that the user also knows.

moves.name: light-screen
moves.effect: Reduces damage from special attacks by 50% for five turns.

moves.name: metronome
moves.effect: Randomly selects and uses any move in the game.

moves.name: misty-explosion
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: misty-terrain
moves.effect: For five turns, protects all Pokémon on the ground from major status ailments and confusion, and halves the power of incoming dragon moves.

moves.name: play-rough
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: psybeam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: psych-up
moves.effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.

moves.name: psychic
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: psychic-fangs
moves.effect: Destroys Reflect and Light Screen.

moves.name: psychic-terrain
moves.effect: Protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and increases the power of their  Psychic moves by 50%.

moves.name: psyshock
moves.effect: Inflicts damage based on the target’s Defense, not Special Defense.

moves.name: rain-dance
moves.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.

moves.name: reflect
moves.effect: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: roar
moves.effect: Immediately ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.

moves.name: rock-tomb
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: sandstorm
moves.effect: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.

moves.name: scary-face
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: stealth-rock
moves.effect: Causes damage when opposing Pokémon switch in.

moves.name: stomping-tantrum
moves.effect: Has double power if the user’s last move failed.

moves.name: stored-power
moves.effect: Power is higher the more the user’s stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: sunny-day
moves.effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.

moves.name: take-down
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: thunder
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: thunder-fang
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target and a 10% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: thunder-punch
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: thunder-wave
moves.effect: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: thunderbolt
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: trick
moves.effect: User and target swap items.

moves.name: trick-room
moves.effect: For five turns, slower Pokémon will act before faster Pokémon.

moves.name: uproar
moves.effect: Forced to use this move for several turns.  Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.

moves.name: water-pulse
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: zen-headbutt
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

abilitiesDetailed.name: protosynthesis
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Raises highest stat in harsh sunlight, or if holding Booster Energy.
